Title: Copilot Office 365
Description: Copilot for Office 365 is an AI-powered assistant integrated into Microsoft Office 365 applications, such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook. It helps users enhance productivity by offering features like automated text generation, data analysis, task management, and personalized suggestions. Essentially, it's like having a digital co-worker who assists you in completing tasks more efficiently and effectively.

Title: Customer Portal
Description: The Customer Portal is the "one stop shop" solution for the SMT customers. It provides access to key data and information: overview of the spare part orders, hotline tickets (i.e., corrective service) and defects, machines at a customer location, installed software and possible upgrades, new software features, training (incl. progress team overview for managers), and way more. The Portal offers a seamless integration with the other ASMPT SMT Online Tools leveraging a modern Single Sign On solution (i.e., Identity Portal).
Technical characteristics: ASPNet Core application with MSSQL database. Integration with Online Tools and Azure AD (B2B and B2C).
Extensibility characteristics: Flexible / modular approach. The different part shared the "framework" but fetch data from different data sources.
Integrated to: GFO Data Hub;#51;#GFO;#29;#SAP Integration Suite;#112;#ASMPT Academy;#34;#WebShop;#37
Notes: As of 2025.11.24, we have 680 users (SMT + customers)
Cost and billing arrangements: SLA with Griscom and other partners (i.e., part of the yearly sustaining budget).

Title: License Portal
Description: New solution for administration of the WORKS software licenses. IT replaces the former Customer Information Portal (CIP) solution developed by Griscom in the past. The new solution is seamless integrated with the new Customer Portal and Identity Portal, offering a modern, fresh user experience for customers and SMT users.
Technical characteristics: ASPNet Core, Microsoft MSSQL. Integration with SAP and logically with the R&D License Manager
Cost and billing arrangements: SLA with Griscom, part of sustaining budget. New development managed as separate budget / project.

Title: Identity Portal
Description: The Identity Portal allows the ASMPT SMT organization and customers to centrally manage the identity profiles and high-level authorization  for accessing the Online Tools.  The solution provides self-service capabilities to reduce the administration overhead, and it guarantees a seamless integration (i.e., Single Sign On) with all the SMT Online Tools (i.e., Toolkit, WebShop, Academy, etc.).
Technical characteristics: Based on Azure B2B for SMT users and Azure B2C for customers. Underlying technology shared with Customer Portal and License Portal (i.e., ASPNet Core). OpenIDConnect / Oauth 2.0 as underlying protocol / framework
Cost and billing arrangements: Azure B2C for customer users has limited running costs. The SMT users are part of the existing Azure B2B / Office 365.

Title: KINEXON Order Tracking and Process Management
Description:
KINEXON OS is a real-time automation platform for tracking and controlling moving assets (e.g., machines, trolleys) in production and logistics. It uses UWB-based RTLS technology and offers features such as digital twin and process automation.
(This entry in the Application Catalog also includes the tool "AutomatedBookingSystem", which is an in-house development of SMT SCM 2. - see "Technical characteristics")
Current Version: GUI release: 3.13.0 Server release: 3.13.0 Control-center release: 2.40.3
Technical characteristics: KINEXON does not have a direct integration with SAP ERP. Therefore, the "AutomatedBookingSystem" (= in-house development of SMT SCM 2) is used, which is connected to KINEXON and SAP ERP. For integration with SAP ERP, the "AutomatedBookingSystem" uses two interfaces (based on interfaces, that have been originally implemented for MES). The first Interface is used to transfer Production Orders from SAP ERP to the "AutomatedBookingSystem" via a xml-File. The second Interface is used to send confirmations for these Production Orders back to SAP ERP. To trigger these Confirmations the "AutomatedBookingSystem" uses Information from KINEXON.
Security characteristics: VPN tunnel for Kinexon to the servers for maintenance and support
Scalability characteristics: License model is not based on the number of users, but on the number of Kinexon tags used (max. 2000).
Cost and billing arrangements: Annual license fees (4-year term, starting in 2025) and annual service contract.
